schema.name: ganglior.node-export
schema.doc: Array of per-night CPAPDex node-exports (each unchanged) + a ganglior.crossnight v1.0 aggregate header.

schema.name: ganglior.node-export
schema.doc: Single-signal PAP-therapy analyzer export. All metrics computed in-browser from the AirSense EDF set only (nothing leaves the device). Device-scored EVE/CSL events are the top apnea tier. SA2 oximetry is a self-gated QC lane — artifact desats are excluded and never emitted. null = not present/computed at this quality. Event `t` is wall-clock HH:MM:SS (no date); `tMs` is absolute floating ms.

crossMetrics.concordanceNote: no oximeter this night — AHI stands on the airflow scoring alone
crossMetrics.leakNote: leak within validity threshold — AHI is trustworthy

quality.sqiBasis: leak-quality (1 − largeLeakFraction) — R7 separate from conf

reserved.doc: Slots awaiting Integrator fusion; null until paired.

schema.name: ganglior.node-export
schema.doc: Single-signal PAP-therapy analyzer export. All metrics computed in-browser from the AirSense EDF set only (nothing leaves the device). Device-scored EVE/CSL events are the top apnea tier. SA2 oximetry is a self-gated QC lane — artifact desats are excluded and never emitted. null = not present/computed at this quality. Event `t` is wall-clock HH:MM:SS (no date); `tMs` is absolute floating ms.

crossMetrics.concordanceNote: no oximeter this night — AHI stands on the airflow scoring alone
crossMetrics.leakNote: high leak + elevated residual AHI — the leak likely corrupts scoring; treat the seal before titrating pressure

quality.sqiBasis: leak-quality (1 − largeLeakFraction) — R7 separate from conf

reserved.doc: Slots awaiting Integrator fusion; null until paired.
